untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern requires visual pattern recognition (cup formation with left/right lips, handle formation, and lip height relationship comparison) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators and operators. The pattern detection logic requires curve analysis and geometric relationships beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: The signal describes a technical chart pattern (Cup with Handle) that requires identifying: (1) cup-shaped price formation with defined left and right lips, (2) handle pullback formation, and (3) comparative analysis of lip heights. These are pattern-recognition tasks that require visual analysis or specialized pattern-detection algorithms, not available in the allowed indicator set. Entry approximated as breakout above recent highs (dc_upper) with exit on break of recent lows (dc_lower), but this does not capture the true pattern semantics. Parameters noted: 68% bull success rate, ~295% average rise, 9% failure rate within 5%.
